reference: Hello, you need a screening of your leg with an X-ray. Secondly, elevate your leg on a pillow, take analgesic medications, prevent contact or pressing your leg until it heals, and apply a warm compress to the affected area. See if it settles in a few days' time.
text: Hello, you need a screening of your leg with an X-ray. Secondly, elevate your leg on a pillow, take analgesic medications, prevent contact or pressing your leg until it heals, and apply a warm compress to the affected area. See if it settles in time.
